subtitle: When Ullal Faced the Ocean Empire

panels.shot: epic low-angle wide of the shoreline kingdom with fleets on the horizon
panels.action: Rani Abbakka Chowta stands on the sea-wall of Ullal in royal coastal attire, wind whipping her veil as dark silhouettes of Portuguese ships loom on the Arabian Sea beyond the coconut-fringed shore.

dialogue.text: In the sixteenth century, when the ocean brought an empire to Ullal’s door, Rani Abbakka Chowta chose to stand between a small port and the hunger of the Portuguese crown.

i18n.hi: सोलहवीं सदी में, जब समुंदर ने साम्राज्य को उल्लाल के दरवाज़े ला खड़ा किया, रानी अब्बक्का चौटा एक छोटे बंदरगाह और पुर्तगाली ताज की भूख के बीच दीवार बन गईं।

panels.shot: wide establishing shot from high above the coastline
panels.action: A sweeping view of Ullal and Mangalore’s coast shows fishing boats, warehouses, temple towers and mosque domes, with caravans arriving at the riverside as Rani Abbakka Chowta surveys her bustling port from a balcony.

dialogue.text: On the Kanara coast, Ullal and Mangalore breathed with the monsoon trade. Pepper, rice and horses moved through their rivers, watched over by the Chowtas and their queen.

i18n.hi: कानरा तट पर, उल्लाल और मंगळूर मानसून के सौदे से सांस लेते थे। काली मिर्च, चावल और घोड़े उनकी नदियों से गुजरते, चौटा राजघराना और उनकी रानी निगरानी करतीं।

panels.shot: medium interior shot in a dim audience hall
panels.action: Rani Abbakka Chowta sits upright on a low throne in a coastal-style durbar, palm-leaf documents on a brass platter before her as a court scribe kneels nearby, while outside the open hall sea light glows harsh and bright.

dialogue.text: By mid-century, Portuguese captains haunted these waters, claiming the king of Portugal’s right to the sea and its spice. Treaties and tributes were their first weapons.

i18n.hi: सदी के बीच तक, पुर्तगाली कप्तान इन जलों में डटे रहे, पुर्तगाल के राजा का समंदर और मसाले पर अधिकार जताते हुए। शुरुआत में उनके हथियार थे समझौते और नज़राने।

panels.shot: medium shot focused on Abbakka and a rolled parchment
panels.action: A close, tense scene shows Rani Abbakka Chowta taking a rolled parchment from a trembling local intermediary dressed in coastal merchant garb, his eyes lowered, while attendants watch silently from the shadows.

dialogue.text: Ullal’s queen had once agreed to tribute, buying an uncertain peace. But each year, demands grew heavier, and each ship of theirs pressed deeper into her creeks.

i18n.hi: उल्लाल की रानी कभी नज़राना मान चुकी थीं, बस एक डगमगाती शांति खरीदने को। पर हर साल मांगें भारी होती गईं, और उनके जहाज़ हर धारा में और भीतर घुसते गए।

panels.shot: tight close-up on Abbakka’s face in thought
panels.action: An intense close-up captures Rani Abbakka Chowta’s steady gaze as she looks past the parchment toward the distant sea, jaw set, a faint sheen of sweat on her brow from the coastal humidity.

dialogue.speaker: rani_abbakka_chowta
dialogue.text: If a queen pays as a subject, what remains of her throne?

i18n.hi: जब रानी प्रजा की तरह चुकाए, तो उसके तख़्त का बचता ही क्या है?

panels.shot: medium shot of Abbakka addressing a small council
panels.action: Rani Abbakka Chowta stands before a small circle of elders and commanders in a simple pillared hall, pointing toward a rough coastal map traced on the floor with charcoal and shells.

dialogue.text: She listened to chiefs and merchants. Some feared ruin if tribute stopped. Others whispered of honour and the old rights of the coast.

i18n.hi: उन्होंने सरदारों और सौदागरों की सुनी। कुछ को डर था कि नज़राना रुकेगा तो बरबादी आएगी। कुछ ने फुसफुसाकर इज़्ज़त और तट के पुराने हकों की बात की।

panels.shot: dramatic three-quarter shot as Abbakka rises
panels.action: In a decisive moment, Rani Abbakka Chowta rises from her seat, hand resting on the hilt of a ceremonial sword, the gathered men falling silent as sea breeze lifts the end of her sari.

dialogue.speaker: rani_abbakka_chowta
dialogue.text: We will trade as equals. We will not pay to be chained.

i18n.hi: हम बराबरी से सौदा करेंगे। ज़ंजीर पहनने के पैसे नहीं देंगे।

panels.shot: wide sea horizon shot with distant ships
panels.action: From a vantage on the dunes, Rani Abbakka Chowta and a few guards shade their eyes and stare out at the Arabian Sea, where tiny specks of distant Portuguese caravels and galleys dot the shimmering horizon.

dialogue.text: Her refusal travelled quickly. In 1555, Lisbon’s answer came riding the waves: twenty-one sails under Dom Álvaro da Silveira, sent to correct a defiant queen of 'Olala'.

i18n.hi: उनकी ना की खबर दूर तक पहुंची। १५५५ में लिस्बन का जवाब लहरों पर चढ़कर आया—इक्कीस जहाज़, डोम आल्वारो दा सिलवेइरा के झंडे तले, 'ओलाला' की ज़िद्दी रानी को सीधा करने भेजे गए।

panels.shot: low-angle shot from the deck of a Portuguese ship toward the coast
panels.action: Seen from behind armored Portuguese officers on the deck of a large ship, the lush Ullal coastline rises ahead, rivers glinting and fortifications small but stubborn against the palm-lined shore.

dialogue.text: To them she was just 'the queen of Ullal', a coastal ruler to be bent. Yet their own chroniclers would remember her as a persistent thorn along the Mangalore shore.

i18n.hi: उनके लिए वो बस 'उल्लाल की रानी' थीं, एक तटी शासक, जिसे मोड़ा जा सके। पर उनके खुद के इतिहासकार उन्हें मंगळूर किनारे की एक चुभती हुई कांटा मानकर लिख गए।

panels.shot: medium shot at a seaside outpost, combining land and sea
panels.action: At a simple watch-post of stone and timber near the river mouth, Rani Abbakka Chowta stands among archers and matchlock bearers, one hand lifted in calm command as fishermen pull in their boats behind her.

dialogue.text: She prepared Ullal first for endurance. Watchmen for every creek, envoys to inland allies, orders that fields be hidden and boats drawn up beyond easy reach.

i18n.hi: उन्होंने पहले उल्लाल को सहने लायक बनाया। हर धारा पर निगरानी, भीतर के साथियों को दूत, खेत छिपाने और नावें दूर, सुरक्षित खींच ले जाने के हुक्म।

panels.shot: intimate medium shot of Abbakka with village heads
panels.action: Inside a thatched village hall, Rani Abbakka Chowta meets with bearded village heads and traders, her hand resting reassuringly on the shoulder of a worried young boatman.

dialogue.speaker: rani_abbakka_chowta
dialogue.text: Whatever comes by sea, remember: Ullal is not for sale.

i18n.hi: समंदर से जो भी आए, याद रखो—उल्लाल बिकाऊ नहीं है।

panels.shot: dramatic wide shot of Portuguese longboats approaching the river mouth
panels.action: Under a grey sky, Portuguese longboats laden with soldiers row toward the Ullal river mouth, oars cutting the water, while on the banks Rani Abbakka Chowta’s defenders stand ready with spears and simple earthworks.

dialogue.text: The fleet did not find a meek vassal. They found a shore already hardened, its queen unwilling to yield river, port or coin to foreign order.

i18n.hi: बेड़े को कोई झुकी हुई जागीरदार नहीं मिली। उन्हें मिला एक सख़्त पड़ा तट, जिसकी रानी ने नदी, बंदरगाह या सिक्का किसी पराए हुक्म को देने से मना कर दिया।

panels.shot: medium shot on Abbakka overseeing defenses at dusk
panels.action: At dusk, torches burn along a makeshift rampart near the water as Rani Abbakka Chowta walks its length, quietly inspecting positions while waves crash in the darkness beyond.

dialogue.text: Exact blows and counterblows blur in the surviving lines of Portuguese record. But they agree on this: Ullal did not fall into their pattern of tribute and control.

i18n.hi: घात और पलटवार की सही तस्वीर पुर्तगाली रिकॉर्ड की बची पंक्तियों में धुंधली है। पर एक बात पर सब सहमत हैं—उल्लाल उनके नज़राने और गिरफ्त वाले ढांचे में नहीं ढला।

panels.shot: somber interior shot after the fleet’s withdrawal
panels.action: In a quieter later scene, Rani Abbakka Chowta sits again in her audience hall, a little more tired, as a messenger kneels reporting the fleet’s withdrawal while jars of grain and bales of pepper stand stacked behind.

dialogue.text: The expedition of twenty-one sail did not secure the obedience they sought. The queen of Ullal remained what the gazetteers would later call her: a persistent opponent along the Kanara coast.

i18n.hi: इक्कीस जहाज़ों का यह धावा वह फ़रमांबरदारी नहीं ला सका जो वे चाहते थे। उल्लाल की रानी वही रहीं, जैसा राज-गज़ट बाद में लिखेगा—कानरा तट की अडिग दुश्मन।

panels.shot: close-up of Abbakka’s hand on a map and a ship token
panels.action: A close view shows Rani Abbakka Chowta’s hand resting on a palm-leaf map, a tiny wooden ship-token pushed back from Ullal’s river mouth, her fingers firm and unshaking.

dialogue.speaker: rani_abbakka_chowta
dialogue.text: They will write their version. Our rivers will remember ours.

i18n.hi: वे अपनी कहानी लिखेंगे। हमारी नदियाँ हमारी याद रखेंगी।

panels.shot: wide epilogue shot of the modern Mangalore-Ullal coastline
panels.action: An epilogue vision shows the present-day Mangalore–Ullal coastline with modern boats and buildings, while a faint, dignified silhouette of Rani Abbakka Chowta seems to stand over the waters in the sky like a memory.

dialogue.text: Today, the records name a 'queen of Ullal' who refused tribute, and coastal lore gives her the name Abbakka Chowta—a reminder that even small ports can say no to an ocean empire.

i18n.hi: आज के रिकॉर्ड में 'उल्लाल की रानी' दर्ज है, जिसने नज़राना ठुकराया, और तट की लोककथाएँ उसे अब्बक्का चौटा कहती हैं—याद दिलाती हुई कि छोटा सा बंदरगाह भी सागर साम्राज्य को ना कह सकता है।

subtitle_i18n.en: When Ullal Faced the Ocean Empire
subtitle_i18n.hi: जब उल्लाल ने सागर साम्राज्य को ललकारा
